--- grant_on_all_sequences_in_schema.sql
GRANT SELECT ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA sch1, sch2 TO ROLE r
--- AST
&ast.Grant{
  Privilege: &ast.PrivilegeOnAllSequencesInSchema{
    Privileges: []ast.TablePrivilege{
      &ast.SelectPrivilege{
        Select: 6,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
    },
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 40,
            NameEnd: 44,
            Name:    "sch1",
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 46,
            NameEnd: 50,
            Name:    "sch2",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 59,
      NameEnd: 60,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT SELECT ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA sch1, sch2 TO ROLE r
